adrs.title: Encryption Algorithm
adrs.decision: Use AES-256 in CBC mode with PKCS7 padding for all data encrypted at rest.

adrs.title: Abuse Notification Email Latency
adrs.decision: Send notification emails asynchronously via message queue, ensuring delivery within 2 minutes of abuse flag.

adrs.title: Rate Limiting Strategy
adrs.decision: Implement token-bucket algorithm with capacity of 100 tokens per minute per API key.
